title: Auto Air Conditioner Fault Diagnostic Table by DTC

blocks.text: Auto Air Conditioner Fault Diagnostic Table by DTC

rows: Auto A/C control unit communication circuit error (Bus off)
Auto A/C control unit cannot receive communication from combination meter control unit
Disconnection of cord of internal air temperature sensor, sensor failure
Shorted cord of internal air temperature sensor, defective sensor
Disconnection of cord of outside temperature sensor, sensor failure
Short-circuited cord of outside temperature sensor, defective sensor
Disconnection of cord of solar radiation sensor, sensor failure
Short circuit in cord of solar radiation sensor, sensor failure
Evaporator Disconnection of sensor cord, sensor failure
Evaporator Shorted sensor cord, defective sensor
Disconnection of potentiometer of air mix motor
Short circuit of potentiometer of air mix motor
Mode Disconnection or short-circuit of motor cord
Blower Motor cord break, short, blown fuse, motor lock
Unable to receive wiper frames from MICU
